PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Nov-05-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Charles Jonas for Morgan Edwards.

The Court waives notice to Yolanda Harris for the purpose of this petition. Mr. Jonas stated he found no middle initial for Yolanda and that his Client did not have any information. The Court granted the petition for letters of administration (subject to review of the order). Bond is set at $215,000.00.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
